video_title: Why Your Willpower Runs Out (And What Actually Replenishes It)
scene_title: Hook — The 7 AM Superhero vs. 10 PM Gremlin

scenes.image_prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A breathtaking sunrise breaks over a sprawling cityscape, casting long golden rays that flood through a tall bedroom window with translucent curtains gently billowing inward. The warm amber and peach light spills across the room, painting every surface in a honeyed glow. Nestled under a plush lavender comforter in a cozy bed, a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—sleeps peacefully. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes are gently closed, sparkles still faintly visible through the lids, framed by delicate purple eyebrows and a serene, contented smile. Slung over the bedpost nearby is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm catching the first golden rays of dawn. The bedroom features a small alarm clock on the nightstand, a potted plant on the windowsill, and soft pastel walls. no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. Bursting out of bed with explosive morning energy, a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—leaps into the air with both fists pumped triumphantly overhead. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, framed by delicate purple eyebrows and a wide, beaming grin of pure determination. Slung over its shoulder is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm catching the bright morning light streaming through the window. The blanket flies dramatically behind the character like a hero's cape, and radiant golden speed lines burst outward from the character's body. The bedroom is bathed in warm sunrise light, with the pillow still bouncing on the mattress from the energetic launch. no text

scenes.text_content: morning workout, eat a healthy breakfast,

On the left, a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—performs push-ups on a bright teal yoga mat, tiny arms pushing up with exaggerated effort. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, framed by delicate purple eyebrows and a fierce, focused expression. Glowing neon-green energy lines radiate from the character's body like an aura of vitality. On the right, the same character sits happily at a sunlit breakfast table with a colorful bowl overflowing with vibrant strawberries, blueberries, banana slices, and granola, plus a tall glass of orange juice. Slung over the back of the chair is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm catching the warm kitchen light. no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A massive ornate wall clock dominates the center of the composition, its hands spinning rapidly in a dramatic motion blur. The background transitions in a sweeping gradient from warm golden daylight on the left to deep midnight blue and moody purple on the right, representing the passage of an entire day in a single striking image. Streaks of time fly past like comet trails, shifting from bright yellows and oranges into cool indigos and violets. The clock face itself transitions from a cheerful sun motif on the bright side to a crescent moon on the dark side. Small silhouettes of daily activities flash by in the motion streaks—a desk, a lunch plate, a meeting table—all dissolving into the encroaching darkness. Stars begin to appear on the right side of the frame, twinkling faintly against the deep blue-purple night sky. no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. In a dim, cluttered living room bathed in blue-gray moonlight filtering through half-closed blinds, a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—is slumped deep into an oversized couch, body sinking into the cushions like melting butter. Slung limply beside it on the couch is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm reflecting the dim blue glow of the room. The coffee table is littered with crumpled wrappers, an empty mug tipped on its side, and scattered cushions. A single dim lamp casts a tired yellow pool of light in the corner. no text

scenes.text_content: elbow-deep in a bag of chips,
scenes.image_prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A dramatic close-up shot shows a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—with both stubby arms plunged deep into an oversized, crinkly snack bag that towers almost as tall as the character. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle faintly with a starry, magical gradient, framed by delicate purple eyebrows and a guilty, mindless expression of snacking autopilot. Slung over its shoulder is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm dusted with crumbs. Golden chip crumbs are scattered dramatically across the couch cushions, the character's chest, and the surrounding area like confetti. The bag crinkles with exaggerated comic-book sound-effect lines radiating outward. The dim living room glows faintly in the background with cool blue-purple tones. no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. In near-total darkness, a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—holds a glowing smartphone inches from its face, the harsh blue-white screen light casting dramatic upward shadows across its features. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes are glazed and wide open, the magical gradient dulled to a flat hypnotized stare, framed by delicate purple eyebrows and a slack, vacant expression. Slung beside it on the couch is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm dimly reflecting the phone glow. The phone screen shows an endless blur of colorful rectangles scrolling by at speed. The character's thumb moves in a repetitive downward swipe. The surrounding room is pitch black except for the eerie rectangular glow illuminating the character's face. no text

The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. Still slumped on the couch in the dim room, a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—weakly raises one stubby arm to give a limp, half-hearted thumbs-up, the gesture completely lacking conviction. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle faintly with a starry, magical gradient, framed by delicate purple eyebrows and a defeated, regretful grimace that screams instant remorse. Slung over the armrest nearby is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm barely catching the faint lamplight. A ghostly speech bubble above contains only a wilted checkmark symbol. The character's posture is completely deflated, shoulders drooped, body sunken into the cushions. Dark shadows and muted purple-blue tones fill the room, emphasizing the character's total lack of resistance and energy. no text

scenes.text_content: So what happened between sunrise and sunset
scenes.image_prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A long, winding road stretches across the entire frame from left to right, beginning at a brilliant golden sunrise with warm peach and amber clouds on the far left and ending at a deep violet-blue sunset with purple and indigo clouds on the far right. Standing at the midpoint of the road, a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—looks left and right with a bewildered, confused expression, tiny arms spread in a questioning shrug. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, framed by delicate purple eyebrows and a puzzled, searching frown. Slung over its shoulder is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm catching the mixed golden-purple light. A large floating question mark hovers above the character's head. no text

scenes.text_content: into a gremlin with no impulse control?
scenes.image_prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. In a dark, chaotic nighttime scene, a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows—has transformed into a mischievous gremlin-like version of itself, hair wild and spiky, tiny fangs visible in a chaotic grin, grabbing fistfuls of junk food with both hands from an avalanche of colorful snack bags, candy, and cookies surrounding it. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient but now have a wild, unhinged gleam, framed by delicate purple eyebrows arched in maniacal glee and a crazed, impulsive expression. Slung crookedly over its shoulder is its teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm dangling loosely and catching the chaotic neon glow. The background is a mess of wrappers and crumbs, lit by flickering screens and garish purple-green lighting. no text
